meta.title: feedBack Song Editor — teaser v1.8
meta.notes: Captions baked onto base stills by make_assets.py; timeline assembled by build_mlt.py and rendered with melt. LIVE-flagged segments use a still stand-in now; Byron records real footage per SHOTLIST.md.

segments.title: Drop a Guitar Pro file.
segments.sub: GP3–GP8 with embedded audio, MIDI, MusicXML — auto-detected.

segments.title: Auto-synced to the track.
segments.sub: On a real, full-resolution min/max waveform.

segments.title: Shape every note.
segments.sub: The inspector: bends, bend curves, techniques, teaching marks.

segments.title: Bend time to the beat.
segments.sub: EOF-style tempo map — drag a pole, BPM recalculates live.

segments.title: Sharp at any zoom.
segments.sub: The whole song down to a single peak.

segments.title: Edit 18-piece drums.
segments.sub: A full drum grid, imported straight from the tab.

segments.title: Record MIDI, live.
segments.sub: Play your keys straight onto the chart.

segments.title: Pick a bar. Play it on the highway.
segments.sub: …and land right back where you were editing.
segments.live: Byron records the full editor→highway→editor round-trip (SHOTLIST §3).
